title: Reporting Speech Practice
prompt: Convert the following direct speech into reported speech: "I have not seen you in a while, what have you been up to?"
hint: Use reporting verbs like 'said', 'asked', and change the pronouns and tense accordingly.
sample: He asked if I had not seen him in a while and what I had been up to.

ja.prompt: 次の直接話法を間接話法に変換してください：「I have not seen you in a while, what have you been up to?」
ja.hint: 「said」や「asked」などの報告動詞を使い、代名詞や時制を適切に変えてください。
ja.sample: 彼は私にしばらく会っていなかったことと、何をしていたのか尋ねました。

zh.prompt: 將以下直接引語轉換為間接引語：「I have not seen you in a while, what have you been up to?」
zh.hint: 使用報告動詞如 'said', 'asked'，並適當更改代詞和時態。
zh.sample: 他問我是否有一段時間沒見他了，還有我最近在忙什麼。

title: Describing a Car Accident
prompt: Describe a car accident using reported speech based on this direct speech: "I had a car accident yesterday, and unfortunately I broke my arm."
hint: Use past perfect tense for events that happened before the reporting time and reporting verbs like 'said' or 'explained'.
sample: He said that he had had a car accident the day before and had unfortunately broken his arm.

ja.prompt: 次の直接話法を基に、間接話法で自動車事故を説明してください：「I had a car accident yesterday, and unfortunately I broke my arm.」
ja.hint: 報告時点より前に起こった出来事には過去完了形を使い、「said」や「explained」などの報告動詞を使ってください。
ja.sample: 彼は前日に自動車事故に遭い、不幸にも腕を骨折したと言いました。

zh.prompt: 根據以下直接引語，用間接引語描述一次車禍：「I had a car accident yesterday, and unfortunately I broke my arm.」
zh.hint: 對於報告時間之前發生的事件使用過去完成式，並使用報告動詞如 'said' 或 'explained'。
zh.sample: 他說他前一天發生了車禍，不幸地摔斷了手臂。

title: Inviting and Responding to Invitations
prompt: Rewrite the following invitation and response into reported speech: "I'm having a birthday party next Friday. Do you want to come?" and "That sounds like fun. Is it at your house?"
hint: Use reporting verbs like 'invited' and 'asked', and change the pronouns and tense accordingly.
sample: She said she was having a birthday party next Friday and asked if I wanted to come. I said that it sounded like fun and asked if it was at her house.

ja.prompt: 次の招待と返答を間接話法に書き換えてください：「I'm having a birthday party next Friday. Do you want to come?」と「That sounds like fun. Is it at your house?」
ja.hint: 「invited」や「asked」などの報告動詞を使い、代名詞や時制を適切に変えてください。
ja.sample: 彼女は次の金曜日に誕生日パーティーを開くと言い、来たいか尋ねました。私は楽しそうだと言い、それが彼女の家であるか尋ねました。

zh.prompt: 將以下邀請和回應改寫成間接引語：「I'm having a birthday party next Friday. Do you want to come?」和「That sounds like fun. Is it at your house?」
zh.hint: 使用報告動詞如 'invited' 和 'asked'，並適當更改代詞和時態。
zh.sample: 她說她下週五要辦生日派對，並問我是否想來。我說那聽起來很有趣，並問是否在她家。

title: Expressing Excitement About Getting a Car
prompt: Convert this direct speech into reported speech: "I'm getting my own car tomorrow. I'm really excited."
hint: Change the tense to past and use reporting verbs like 'said' or 'told'.
sample: He said he was getting his own car the next day and that he was really excited.

ja.prompt: 次の直接話法を間接話法に変換してください：「I'm getting my own car tomorrow. I'm really excited.」
ja.hint: 時制を過去形に変え、「said」や「told」などの報告動詞を使ってください。
ja.sample: 彼は翌日に自分の車を手に入れると言い、とても楽しみにしていると言いました。

zh.prompt: 將以下直接引語轉換為間接引語：「I'm getting my own car tomorrow. I'm really excited.」
zh.hint: 將時態改為過去式，並使用報告動詞如 'said' 或 'told'。
zh.sample: 他說他隔天會有自己的車，並且非常興奮。

title: Discussing Driving Practice
prompt: Report this question and answer: "Have you started practicing driving yet?" and "I got my permit two weeks ago, but I haven't been able to practice yet."
hint: Use reported speech with appropriate tense changes and reporting verbs like 'asked' and 'said'.
sample: He asked if I had started practicing driving yet. I said that I had gotten my permit two weeks ago but hadn't been able to practice yet.

ja.prompt: 次の質問と答えを間接話法で報告してください：「Have you started practicing driving yet?」と「I got my permit two weeks ago, but I haven't been able to practice yet.」
ja.hint: 適切な時制の変化と「asked」や「said」などの報告動詞を使ってください。
ja.sample: 彼は私に運転の練習を始めたか尋ねました。私は2週間前に運転許可証を取得したが、まだ練習できていないと言いました。

zh.prompt: 將以下問題和回答用間接引語報告：「Have you started practicing driving yet?」和「I got my permit two weeks ago, but I haven't been able to practice yet.」
zh.hint: 使用適當的時態變化和報告動詞如 'asked' 和 'said'。
zh.sample: 他問我是否已經開始練習開車。我說我兩週前拿到駕照，但還沒能練習。
